Event handlers demo - See the console log for more detail (F12)
Event handler Description
editorCreate Triggered when the editor is created. Returns editor instance.
editorChange Triggered when text or selection is updated - independent of the source.
contentChange Triggered when the editor's content is updated.
selectionChange Triggered when the selection is updated.
focus Triggered when the editor is focused.
blur Triggered when the editor is blurred.
charactersCountChange Triggered when the number of characters in the editor changes.
wordsCountChange Triggered when the number of words in the editor changes.
Console log toggle : {{ isConsoleLogActive }}
